question:
To determine if you need to use placards, which of the following is NOT something you need to know?
1) The manufacturing date of the material
2) The hazard class of the substance or material
3) The amount of all the hazardous materials of all classes in your vehicle
4) The amount of a substance or material being shipped
canonical_answer: The manufacturing date of the material

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: The manufacturing date of the material

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: The manufacturing date of the material

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: The manufacturing date of the material

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: The manufacturing date of the material

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Test Answers
appears_in.answer: The manufacturing date of the material
